---
title: "Biostatistical Analysis Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: true
    keep_tex: false
    includes:
      in_header: header.tex
geometry: "margin=1in"
fontsize: 11pt
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  out.width = "90%"
)
```

{{REPORT_CONTENT}}
